title: The Straw Hats Break Through Totto Land
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Judge, Unknown person #10, Perospero, Unknown person #11, Brûlée as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Your last request... What is it!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems that the territorial sea slugs have made it to the front line!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The straw hats' ship has made it out of our territory!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: My big brother on his back, defeated.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You fell on your back on purpose, didn't you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I saw you falling forward at first. weren't you doing that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...but brolee... even in my normal life...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: My back having never touched the ground...

dialogue.speaker: Brûlée
dialogue.text: I've seen you through the mirrors before.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Being the perfect man who nobody could look down on...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was all just an act for us, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you would just hide your mouth, you'd be able to make friends.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dun need 'em!! I am who I am! I'll beat up anyone who laughs at me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The ones you beat up earlier...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Came back to get their revenge, Katakuri!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...then why is my sister the one that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Fine just the way you are.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was my fault that brolee got hurt...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: How dare you mark my sister's face...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I won't show anyone my weakness anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll bring complete and total terror to all of you!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 51 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
